title: xyris coronata
intro: Xyris coronata, also known as the Red-eyed Grass, is a perennial plant species in the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xyris coronata include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Xyris coronata typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves.
